problem id: 89ff5526
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11000000 -> 01100000
  10010011 -> 01111001
  01010010 -> 00001001
  11001011 -> 11010101
  11101011 -> 11000101
  00100011 -> 00100001
  00110110 -> 01111011
  00001101 -> 11010110
  00010001 -> 00011000

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 11011101
